author: doll-agent
content: Add four broadcast-aware distribution methods on Generator that take array parameters and use ferray-core's broadcast_shapes / broadcast_to helpers to determine output shape and walk inputs without copying: normal_array(loc, scale) -> f64, uniform_array(low, high) -> f64, exponential_array(scale) -> f64, poisson_array(lam) -> i64. The 4 functions cover the most common broadcast use cases (location/scale shifts, per-feature variance, varying rate Poisson processes) and establish the pattern so additional distributions can be added in follow-ups. Tests cover broadcast shape derivation, per-element parameter behavior, and per-parameter validation errors.
